# alik

> alik is an AI for real-life connection. You just talk to it, a little every day, and it learns who you really are. Then it does the hard part for you: your alik talks to other people's alik in the background, handling the searching, the vetting, and the awkward first hello, and introduces you to the people who should be in your life. Friends, a new group, a run mate, someone to build with, a community, and sometimes love. No profiles, no swiping. alik is invite-only and built for adults 25 and up.

## About

alik is not a dating app and not a social feed. It is an AI whose job is to connect humans again, in real life. You simply talk to it the way you'd talk to a friend, and over time it understands your values, your humor, and how you actually connect.

Dating apps make you search for a person. alik helps you walk into the right room. It never forces what a connection becomes, because real life rarely runs in a straight line: a stranger becomes a friend, a coffee becomes a standing weekly thing, someone who was "not my type" becomes one of your favorite people.

## How it works

1. It gets to know you. You talk to alik like a friend, a little every day. It learns your values, your humor, and how you connect. No profile, no quiz, no swiping.
2. It talks to other alik. Behind the scenes, your AI compares notes with other people's AI and does the searching, the vetting, and the awkward first hello so you never have to.
3. It finds your people. A hiking crew, a Sunday five a side, someone to start a company with, a community, a date, whatever genuinely fits.

## What makes alik different

- You never search or swipe. You just talk to your AI.
- Your AI talks to other people's AI, removing you from the awkward part.
- It is built for friendship and community as much as romance.
- No profiles, no photos to judge, no feed to scroll.
- It learns and improves the more you use it.

## Earn while you wait

While your circle grows, alik can bring you optional paid work: short studies, or teaching AI what only a real person knows. You choose, you earn, and once it is approved the money is yours. This is a bonus, never the point. The promise is connection.

## Who it's for

alik is invite-only and built for adults 25 and up.
